entries.title: SewaTani.com
entries.description: SewaTani is a web-based platform developed to help small-scale farmers in Malaysia easily rent agricultural machinery. The system centralizes machinery listings, bookings, and management processes for users, staff, and administrators. Designed with a focus on accessibility, cost-efficiency, and operational transparency, SewaTani supports sustainable digital transformation in the agricultural sector. Built using the Agile methodology, the platform integrates user authentication, booking management, and staff administration through a responsive interface and secure database operations.

images.title: Booking page
images.caption: Real-time machinery reservation with live booking-status tracking.

images.title: Catalog page
images.caption: Machinery catalog with search and filter.

images.title: Landing page
images.caption: Overview of the platform and access to machinery listings.

entries.title: Sportify
entries.description: Sportify is a web platform designed to revolutionize court bookings, replacing the outdated process of using WhatsApp with a seamless, efficient, and user-friendly solution. Our goal is to simplify the booking experience for sports enthusiasts while providing court managers with better tools for organization. A huge shoutout to my amazing team for their dedication and collaboration in making this idea a reality!

images.title: Booking page
images.caption: Court booking interface.

images.title: Landing page
images.caption: Sportify landing page.

images.title: The team
images.caption: With my project team — I served as Scrum leader.

entries.title: Developer Internship — Lekir Tech
entries.description: Contributing as a DevOps Intern, focusing on building and optimizing workflow automation for internal and client-based systems. I work closely with developers and AI product teams to streamline development processes, enhance deployment reliability, and improve CI/CD efficiency. Develop and maintain automated workflows using n8n based on client requirements. Support CI/CD pipeline implementation to improve system deployment and delivery speed.

entries.title: Program Kasih Kesuza
entries.description: Joined a community outreach program at Kampung Pos Titom, Pahang to support the local Orang Asli community. Our team delivered basic necessities, organized fun activities for children, and carried out minor community service including cleaning and repainting public facilities such as toilets. The program aimed to foster empathy, teamwork, and social responsibility among university students while supporting rural community well-being.

images.title: Distributing necessities

entries.title: Bangkuthon
entries.description: Contributed as part of a student volunteer team in Bangkuthon, a community initiative focused on enhancing the riverside area of Sungai Langat, UKM. Our team designed, built, and installed DIY benches to create a more comfortable and inviting environment for students and visitors. The project emphasized teamwork, sustainability, and community engagement under the guidance of our program advisor.

images.title: After the build
images.caption: Completing our DIY bench installation by the river.

images.title: With the team & advisor
images.caption: With our advisor and teammates at the riverside site.

entries.title: Zaba Aid (Ramadan Outreach)
entries.description: Participated in a Ramadan community outreach program at PPR Gombak, organized in collaboration with Dapur Pasak. The initiative focused on supporting underprivileged families by distributing food supplies, clothing, and daily necessities during the fasting month. Our team worked together to ensure fair distribution, engage with the local community, and spread kindness throughout Ramadan.

images.title: Ramadan outreach
images.caption: Group photo after completing the Ramadan outreach at PPR Gombak.
